stat.strength-explanation: Increases damage dealt by physical attacks and techniques.
stat.defense-explanation: Reduces damage taken from physical attacks and techniques.
stat.spirit-explanation: Increases damage dealt by magical techniques and decreases damage received from magical techniques.
stat.wisdom-explanation: Increases the accuracy of magical techniques and the chance to evade magical techniques.
stat.speed-explanation: Determines the turn order in battle and increases the chance of evading physical attacks and techniques.
stat.charisma-explanation: Determines when certain in-game events can take place, such as battles against other trainers.
stat.fire-explanation: Increases resistance against Fire-element techniques and the critical hit rate for techniques of that element. Training Fire resistance also increases maximum MP.
stat.water-explanation: Increases resistance against Water-element techniques and the critical hit chance for techniques of that element. Training Water resistance may lower Defense.
stat.ice-explanation: Increases resistance against Ice-element techniques and the critical hit chance for techniques of that element. Training Ice resistance may reduce Speed.
stat.wind-explanation: Increases resistance against Wind-element techniques and the critical hit chance for techniques of that element. Training Wind resistance may reduce Strength.
stat.thunder-explanation: Increases resistance against Thunder-element techniques and the critical hit chance for techniques of that element. Training Thunder resistance may lower Wisdom.
stat.machine-explanation: Increases resistance against Machine-element techniques and the critical hit rate for techniques of that element. Training Machine resistance also increases maximum HP.
stat.dark-explanation: Increases resistance against Dark-element techniques and the critical hit chance for techniques of that element. Training Dark resistance may lower Spirit.
